place.summary: Ngong Ping 360 functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Hong Kong Disneyland. Visitors often continue to Ngong Ping Village. Its observed experience trails the category average, despite existing visitor demand.

compare_candidates.poi_name: Big Grizzly Mountain Runaway Mine Cars

opportunity_cards.title: Frequent companion: Hong Kong Disneyland
opportunity_cards.detail: Ngong Ping 360 frequently appears alongside Hong Kong Disneyland, suggesting cross-promotion or route packaging potential.

opportunity_cards.title: Strong onward link to Hong Kong International Airport
opportunity_cards.detail: Visitors often continue from Ngong Ping 360 to Hong Kong International Airport, with relatively strong journey experience.

opportunity_cards.title: High visibility, weaker experience
opportunity_cards.detail: Ngong Ping 360 draws meaningful traffic but performs below its category average on experience.
